summary: Content Sections (User/Post/Thread/QueueItem intel drawer). Migrates every hardcoded hex in the cadence chip, new-account badge, repeat-offender halo/badge/label, activity sparkline, kind glyphs, similarity panel/pills, and muted drawer text onto GAM_TOK (inline cssText) and var(--gam-tok-*) (style rules). Cadence chip color now driven by a token map (BURSTING->danger, HEAVY->warn, NEW->special, normal->ink-muted) at consistent saturation. Similarity pills standardized onto danger/warn/ink-muted tiers (locked .sim-pill--* names restyled, not renamed). Repeat-halo restyled to a persistent accent-line ring (PRM pulse already gated). Sparkline heights capped to a normalized CSS scale (max-height:16px) so distributions stay comparable. New-account badge drops ui-monospace for 11px tabular caps with a special outline. Similarity empty/loading text routed to ink-muted instead of the ambiguous #3a5a7a. Component hex-literal count drops to zero.

edits.note: WP-10.1: cadence chip color from token map (BURSTING->danger, HEAVY->warn, NEW->special, else ink-muted) at consistent saturation; chip well -> surface-sunken token; 11px tabular caps + 6px radius per type scale. Kills #ff3b3b / C.AMBER / #a78bfa / #9b9892 / rgba(0,0,0,0.3).
WP-10.6: new-account badge onto special-soft bg + special outline; kill ui-monospace -> 11px tabular caps (cross-font consistency, shared with WP-08). Kills rgba(167,139,250,0.15) + #a78bfa pair.
Precedent reason text -> ink-muted (tertiary instruction text routes to ink-muted, not ink-faint). Kills #a0aec0.
Profile-meta line -> ink-muted. Kills #a0aec0.

edits.oldString: histDiv.appendChild(el('em', {style: 'color:#718096;font-size:11px;'}, 'No ban records in recent audit window.'));
edits.newString: histDiv.appendChild(el('em', {style: 'color:'+GAM_TOK.inkMuted+';font-size:11px;'}, 'No ban records in recent audit window.'));
edits.note: WP-10.5: explicit empty-state copy on ink-muted (not ambiguous muted hex). Kills #718096.
Disclaimer caption '(NAIVE v7.0)' -> ink-faint (genuine de-emphasized label). Kills #718096.
Section-2 counts line -> ink-muted. Kills #a0aec0.

edits.oldString: const loadEl = el('div', { style: 'color:#3a5a7a;font-size:10px;padding:4px 0;' }, 'Scanning co-commenter graph...');
edits.newString: const loadEl = el('div', { style: 'color:'+GAM_TOK.inkMuted+';font-size:10px;padding:4px 0;' }, 'Scanning co-commenter graph...');
edits.note: Similarity loading text -> ink-muted (not the bespoke #3a5a7a). Kills #3a5a7a.

edits.oldString:
body.appendChild(el('div', { style: 'color:#3a5a7a;font-size:10px;padding:4px 0;font-style:italic;' },
            'No lookalikes found -- this user appears unique'));
edits.newString:
body.appendChild(el('div', { style: 'color:'+GAM_TOK.inkMuted+';font-size:10px;padding:4px 0;font-style:italic;' },
            'No lookalikes found -- this user appears unique'));
edits.note: WP-10.5: similarity empty-state copy -> ink-muted (explicit no-signal block, not ambiguous muted). Kills #3a5a7a.

WP-10.4 / WP-08 shared: repeat-halo persistent ring -> accent border + 2px accent-line box-shadow (survives re-render + PRM; the pulse is the PRM-gated enhancement, already gated below). 6px radius per design language. Kills #f5a623 + rgba(245,166,35,.18).
Repeat-count badge -> danger fill + on-accent-light text (white on red per on-accent split); tabular count. Kills #f04040 + #fff literals.
REPEAT OFFENDER label -> accent caps + accent left-rail (chrome accent, consistent with halo). Kills both #f5a623.

Pulse keyframe rebased onto accent-line/accent-soft tokens so the PRM-gated enhancement matches the persistent ring's amber. Kills rgba(245,166,35,*). Resting frame (2px) equals the persistent ring so no jump on animation start/end.

WP-10.3: sparkline bars -> accent-line token (replaces #f5a623+opacity:.7 dim). max-height:16px caps the normalized scale in CSS so distributions stay comparable across users regardless of the JS-set inline ratio height. Kills #f5a623.
Post-kind [P] glyph -> accent. Kills #f5a623.
Comment-kind [C] glyph -> warn (distinct amber-yellow tier from post accent). Kills #e8c84a.

edits.oldString: .sim-panel { border-top:1px solid #1e2a3a; padding:8px 12px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; }
edits.newString: .sim-panel { border-top:1px solid var(--gam-tok-border,#2a2f38); padding:8px 12px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; }
edits.note: Similarity panel top divider -> border token. Kills #1e2a3a.

edits.newString: .sim-panel-header { color:var(--gam-tok-accent,#ff9933); font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.04em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px; }
edits.note: SIMILAR ACCOUNTS section header -> accent caps (matches WP-06 11px accent section-head treatment). Kills #5b8db8.

edits.oldString: .sim-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:3px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #111c27; cursor:pointer; }
edits.newString: .sim-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:3px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--gam-tok-border,#2a2f38); cursor:pointer; }
edits.note: Similarity row divider -> border token. Kills #111c27.
Similarity row hover -> accent-soft (standard hover-row well). Kills #0d1820.
Similarity username -> primary ink. Kills #c8d8e8.
WP-10.2: HIGH confidence -> danger tier (soft bg + danger ink + danger border). Locked .sim-pill--HIGH name preserved, restyle only. Kills #3d1a1a/#ff6b6b/#7a2020.
WP-10.2: MEDIUM confidence -> warn tier (soft bg + warn ink + warn border). Locked name preserved. Kills #2a2a12/#d4b44a/#5a4a10.

WP-10.2: WATCH (lowest) confidence -> ink-muted tier (neutral overlay well + muted ink + border) so confidence reads positionally danger>warn>muted. Locked name preserved. Kills #162030/#5b8db8/#1e3850.
Similarity row meta (karma/last-seen) -> ink-muted. Kills #3a5a7a.
